title: Hadronic contributions to $α(Q^{2})$ and $\sin^{2}θ_{W}(Q^{2})$ from spectral reconstruction of lattice-QCD data
author_string: Adrián del Pino, David A. Clarke, Carleton DeTar, Aida X. El-Khadra, Elvira Gámiz et al.
abstract: We present preliminary results from a lattice-QCD study of the hadronic contributions to the running of the electromagnetic coupling, $Δα(Q^2)$, and the electroweak mixing angle, $Δ\sin^2θ_{W}(Q^2)$. Using $N_f = 2+1+1$ HISQ ensembles at physical quark masses, we discuss the challenges posed by strong statistical correlations in the time-momentum representation and propose a spectral-reconstruction strategy to obtain controlled continuum-extrapolated results across the full energy range.
comment: 10 pages, 3 figures, Presented at the 42nd International Symposium on Lattice Field Theory (LATTICE2025)
